I found your Dentist Appointment: "Dentist Appointment" on 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic (event ID 5).

How would you like to reschedule it? Please tell me one of the options below:

- Give a new date and time (e.g., "May 22 at 10:00") — I’ll reschedule it exactly to that slot.
- Give a range or preference (e.g., "any morning next week" or "sometime after May 20; afternoons preferred") — I can search your calendar and propose available 1-hour slots.
- Postpone by a specific amount (e.g., "move it one week later, same time").

Also confirm:
- Keep the same duration (1 hour) and location/participants? (default: yes)
- Do you want me to update the calendar and notify participants? (default: yes)

Tell me which option you want and any details, and I’ll reschedule it.
